purpose: Machine-readable dispatch contract for process-build. Hooks read this as fallback ground truth when transcript classification is missing or truncated (e.g., after compaction — H11 audit finding 2026-04-18). Prose contract in SKILL.md remains canonical for agent guidance; this file mirrors it for enforcement.

mandatory_dispatches.name: blueprint-mode
mandatory_dispatches.notes: Primary builder for code/n8n/scripts. Replaced by a domain specialist when DOMAIN is set (see classifier routing).

mandatory_dispatches.name: architect-reviewer
mandatory_dispatches.notes: Post-build review is mandatory per task-classifier mandatory-compound rule. Name was previously documented as 'architect-review' (ghost) — consolidated 2026-04-18 H1 fix.

conditional_dispatches.name: prompt-engineer
conditional_dispatches.condition: artifact contains LLM prompts or agent designs

notes: Content tasks route through process-research then content-marketer directly. Do NOT dispatch content-marketer from inside process-build — that path was deprecated 2026-04-18 (H9 audit finding).
